calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-29-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss The Complaint With Prejudice As To The Named Plaintiffs And Without Prejudice As To The Putative Class; Memorandum In Support; Declaration Of Allan A. Villanueva
Off Calendar Jan-30-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing RE: PLAINTIFFS DANIEL BAAYON AND RUY CAMPOSECO's Motion To Dismiss The Complaint With Prejudice As To The Named Plaintiffs And Without Prejudice As To The Putative Class.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiffs' unopposed "motion to dismiss the complaint with prejudice as to the named plaintiffs and without prejudice as to the putative class" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not Reported. (302/RBU)
